privacy_boundary: Public repository metadata, hashes, and abstract queue semantics only; raw private chat, health or pet-health material, credentials, personal identifiers, and unreviewed uploads are excluded.

records.title: Effective queue state requires canonical snapshot plus append-only projections
records.summary: The canonical queue snapshot can lag later append-only queue updates. Current selection must preserve the snapshot as historical evidence while deriving effective state from later projections under an explicit precedence rule.
records.falsification_or_review_route: Compare the canonical queue blob with later queue-update commits. Falsify this record if no later projection changes an item's effective state or if the committed reducer does not consume both source classes.

records.title: Deterministic queue reducer preserves field-level projection provenance
records.summary: M-004 converted queue precedence into executable reducer logic with deterministic ordering, field-level provenance, explicit conflict recording, and refusal to select through unresolved equal-time conflicts.
records.falsification_or_review_route: Fetch the reducer and test commits, inspect the conflict path, and run the committed tests in a clean checkout. Reject this record if field provenance or conflict refusal is absent.

records.title: Queue reducer lacks retained clean-checkout execution evidence
records.summary: The reducer source and deterministic test contract are committed, but no retained clean-checkout output currently establishes successful repository-context execution.
records.falsification_or_review_route: Resolve only with retained output from node --test tools/continuity/effective-queue.test.mjs and node tools/continuity/effective-queue.mjs against the same immutable source commit.

records.title: The 0741 continuity delta was historically useful but not merge-valid
records.summary: The earlier delta preserved useful queue-projection claims, but it used an unsupported record kind and non-record semantic labels in supersedes. This successor retains the earlier artifact as history while replacing only its merge-ready interpretation with schema-valid records and empty graph links where no canonical CM target exists.
records.falsification_or_review_route: Run the committed delta validator against both artifacts. Falsify this record if the 0741 delta validates unchanged or if this successor fails the same vocabulary and graph-reference checks.
